title: pseudo-fumaria lutea
intro: Pseudo-fumaria lutea, also known as yellow false hellebore, is a plant species in the family Papaveraceae. It is known for its yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of pseudo-fumaria lutea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and have antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as bronchitis and respiratory infections. Pseudo-fumaria lutea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
